name: Fairway Chute

setup.description: On the driving range, set two tees or markers about 20 yards apart, 100+ yards out, forming a narrow chute. Hit 10 drives trying to carry the ball between them.

rules.description: Play 10 tee shots with your driver. The ball must pass through the chute in the air or on its first bounce to count.
scoring: 1 point per drive that passes through the chute

caption: A driving range fairway just got 10 yards narrower. Ten swings, one chute. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
